title: pterostylis mirabilis
intro: Pterostylis mirabilis, also known as the Greenhood orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Pterostylis mirabilis is often used in teas and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
